title: knautia drymeja subsp. centrifrons
intro: Knautia drymeja subsp. centrifrons, also known as Centifolia or Red Mallow, is a flowering plant species within the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Knautia drymeja subsp. centrifrons include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies for skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
